$comment: Seed room catalog for the community-vitality program. slug/name/description feed room creation; category+vibe feed content generation. 'canada' already exists in prod — the seeder must skip existing slugs.

rooms.name: Canada
rooms.description: From coast to coast to coast. News-free zone: culture, places, weather solidarity, and Timbits discourse.
rooms.vibe: already exists in prod (created by the founder) — do NOT recreate; warm national identity humour, weather stories, regional banter, hockey adjacency

rooms.name: AskFacet
rooms.description: Open-ended questions for everyone. Ask anything; the best threads are the ones where every answer teaches you something about people.
rooms.vibe: AskReddit-style open questions; answers are personal stories and hot takes; high comment volume

rooms.name: Today I Learned
rooms.description: Surprising, verifiable facts you just learned. Cite a source, blow some minds.
rooms.vibe: TIL facts with sources; comments add context, corrections, related trivia

rooms.name: Shower Thoughts
rooms.description: The strange little epiphanies that arrive when your hands are busy and your mind isn't.
rooms.vibe: one-liner observations; comments riff, extend, or gently debunk

rooms.name: Explain Like I'm Five
rooms.description: Complex things, explained simply. No jargon, no gatekeeping, no 'well actually' without a better analogy.
rooms.vibe: genuine questions about science/economics/tech; layered friendly explanations

rooms.name: Life Pro Tips
rooms.description: Small habits and tricks that make life measurably better. Practical over clever.
rooms.vibe: concrete tips; comments confirm, improve, or warn about edge cases

rooms.name: Unpopular Opinion
rooms.description: Defend a take most people disagree with. Respectful pushback is the whole point.
rooms.vibe: mild spicy takes (food, media, habits — never hateful); lively civil disagreement

rooms.name: Am I the Jerk?
rooms.description: Describe the conflict, take your verdict. The community judges the situation, not the person.
rooms.vibe: everyday interpersonal dilemmas; comments give verdicts with reasoning; mixed judgements

rooms.name: Mildly Interesting
rooms.description: Things that are... huh, neat. Not amazing. Just mildly interesting, exactly as advertised.
rooms.vibe: small observations and finds; charmed low-key comments

rooms.name: Funny
rooms.description: Jokes, absurd stories, and things that made you laugh out loud. Original material rises.
rooms.vibe: short humorous stories and jokes; comments add punchlines

rooms.name: Dad Jokes
rooms.description: Groan-worthy by design. If you didn't roll your eyes, it doesn't count.
rooms.vibe: puns and setups; comments escalate the pun chain

rooms.name: Programmer Humor
rooms.description: It works on my machine. Jokes for people who talk to computers for a living.
rooms.vibe: dev jokes, naming-things pain, code review stories; comments one-up with war stories

rooms.name: Wholesome
rooms.description: The internet's good news desk. Small kindnesses, proud moments, faith in humanity restored.
rooms.vibe: uplifting micro-stories; warm supportive comments

rooms.name: Facepalm
rooms.description: Moments of magnificent human error — your own included. Laugh with, not at.
rooms.vibe: self-deprecating fail stories; sympathetic 'I've done worse' comments

rooms.name: Technology
rooms.description: What's new, what's broken, and what it means. Discussion over press releases.
rooms.vibe: evergreen tech discussion (right-to-repair, e-waste, smart homes, batteries); opinionated but informed

rooms.name: Programming
rooms.description: The craft of software. Languages, tools, architecture arguments, and hard-won lessons.
rooms.vibe: technical discussions, tooling debates, career questions; substantive comments

rooms.name: Privacy
rooms.description: Practical digital privacy. Threat models over paranoia, tools over tinfoil.
rooms.vibe: on-brand for Facet; tool recommendations, de-Googling journeys, threat-model talk

rooms.name: Self-Hosted
rooms.description: Your data on your hardware. Homelab builds, service swaps, and 3 a.m. backup revelations.
rooms.vibe: homelab setups, service recommendations, cautionary backup tales

rooms.name: Gaming
rooms.description: Every platform, every genre. What you're playing and why it's eating your evenings.
rooms.vibe: what-are-you-playing threads, backlog guilt, retro love, hot takes on difficulty

rooms.name: Movies
rooms.description: Film talk for people who stay through the credits. Recommendations, rewatches, and takes.
rooms.vibe: evergreen film discussion — rewatches, underrated picks, 'first movie that scared you'

rooms.name: Books
rooms.description: What you're reading and what it did to you. All genres, no snobbery.
rooms.vibe: current reads, comfort rereads, DNF confessions, recommendation chains

rooms.name: Music
rooms.description: New finds, old loves, and the songs you can't explain. All genres welcome.
rooms.vibe: discovery threads, 'song stuck in my head', vinyl/streaming debates

rooms.name: Space
rooms.description: The universe, discussed from a safe distance. Astronomy, missions, and cosmic perspective.
rooms.vibe: awe-driven; stargazing tips, mission talk, scale-of-the-universe musings

rooms.name: Science
rooms.description: How we know what we know. Discoveries, methods, and honest uncertainty.
rooms.vibe: accessible science discussion; comments cite sources and admit unknowns

rooms.name: Personal Finance
rooms.description: Budgets, debt, saving, and the boring habits that quietly change your life. Not investment advice.
rooms.vibe: budgeting wins, debt-payoff journeys, frugal tips; supportive and practical, CAD and USD both appear

rooms.name: Cooking
rooms.description: Home cooking without the gatekeeping. Recipes, failures, and the meals that fixed a bad day.
rooms.vibe: weeknight recipes, kitchen fails, 'what do I do with this ingredient'

rooms.name: Fitness
rooms.description: Getting stronger at any starting point. Form checks, routines, and honest progress.
rooms.vibe: beginner-friendly; consistency over intensity; small-win celebrations

rooms.name: Travel
rooms.description: Trip reports, hidden gems, and hard-earned logistics wisdom from people who've been there.
rooms.vibe: trip reports, packing debates, budget vs splurge, underrated destinations

rooms.name: Photography
rooms.description: Making pictures, not just taking them. Gear talk allowed, light talk preferred.
rooms.vibe: composition tips, golden-hour appreciation, phone-vs-camera peace treaty

rooms.name: DIY
rooms.description: Fix it, build it, refinish it. Projects from first attempt to fine craft.
rooms.vibe: home projects, tool advice, proud before/after stories, honest failures

rooms.name: Gardening
rooms.description: Growing things on purpose. Balconies to backyards, zone 3 to zone 9.
rooms.vibe: seasonal advice, plant victories and casualties, short-season Canadian solidarity

rooms.name: Pets
rooms.description: The animals that run our households. Stories, advice, and unreasonable devotion.
rooms.vibe: pet antics, adoption stories, gentle advice threads

rooms.name: Hockey
rooms.description: The good game. NHL to beer league, heartbreak included at no extra charge.
rooms.vibe: evergreen hockey culture — beer league stories, all-time debates, playoff-heartbreak solidarity

rooms.name: Toronto
rooms.description: The 6ix. City life, hidden spots, transit gripes, and where to actually eat.
rooms.vibe: local flavour: TTC gripes, food recs, neighbourhood talk, raccoon respect

rooms.name: Vancouver
rooms.description: Sea, sky, and rent prices. Life on the wet coast.
rooms.vibe: local flavour: rain acceptance, hiking, housing-cost gallows humour

rooms.name: Montréal
rooms.description: La métropole. Bilingual by default — post in French, English, or franglais.
rooms.vibe: bilingual posts welcome: bagel debates, construction-cone jokes, terrasse season

rooms.name: Ottawa
rooms.description: The capital. Canal seasons, government-town life, and where to eat that isn't a chain.
rooms.vibe: local flavour: Rideau canal, winterlude, public-service humour

rooms.name: Europe
rooms.description: The continent, in every language it speaks. Travel, living, and cross-border comparisons.
rooms.vibe: cross-country comparisons, expat questions, rail-travel love

rooms.name: USA
rooms.description: Coast to coast. Regional food fights encouraged, actual fights not.
rooms.vibe: regional culture, road trips, state-vs-state banter
